Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product pages, promotions, and brake part details to feed into email content generation.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls newly created or open support tickets from HubSpot, including customer messages, order details, and ticket metadata.

R1 Support Agent.action: Updates each ticket with the AI-generated classification and draft reply, making it ready for agent review and send.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all form submissions from the Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form stored in HubSpot.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube using target keywords to surface relevant content creators and retrieve their channel metrics and contact signals.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes all discovered creator profiles across platforms and ranks them by relevance to the target brand and campaign goals.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Filters a large pool of raw creator data down to the most relevant prospects, saving significant manual review time and improving outreach quality.

Creator Qualifier.impact: Produces a ranked, objective shortlist of creators worth pursuing, enabling teams to prioritize outreach confidently and avoid wasting budget on poor-fit partnerships.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves stored creator profiles, outreach sequences, and prompt templates from Drive to initialize the outreach workflow.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails directly to each qualified creator from the designated sender account.

Creator Reponse.action: Pulls historical influencer email threads, negotiation outcomes, and conversation patterns to train the AI on past engagement context.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds AI responses in real negotiation history, improving reply quality and deal conversion by mimicking proven communication styles.

Creator Reponse.action: Reads incoming creator reply emails and surfaces the message content and thread context to the AI for processing.

Creator Reponse.action: Analyzes the creator's reply against historical negotiation data and generates a contextually appropriate follow-up or counter-offer response.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends the AI-crafted negotiation response back to the creator, continuing the conversation thread seamlessly.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle stage metrics, contact growth data, and email performance stats to populate the marketing highlights reporting slides.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors William Nguyen's Teams activity for a newly uploaded Excel file containing the latest Super Session Saturday download content.

Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Turns raw performance data into actionable copy improvements, giving the team expert-level recommendations without a copywriter reviewing every ad manually.

Google Ads Copy Audit.action: Sends a formatted audit report email containing the flagged ads, their performance metrics, and Claude's recommended rewrites to the relevant team member.
Google Ads Copy Audit.impact: Delivers a ready-to-act report directly to the right person, so improvements can be reviewed and implemented without logging into any platform to find the data.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Reads the current Agent Tracker sheet, pulling all agent records including status, owner, project notes, and recent activity across all rows.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Captures a complete snapshot of every agent's progress in one pull, removing the need for anyone to manually compile or reformat the data.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Transforms the raw sheet data into a clean, human-readable weekly update with summaries, highlights, and any flagged blockers or stalled agents.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Converts a dense spreadsheet into a digestible briefing that stakeholders can read in under a minute, improving visibility and accountability.

Agent Tracker Agent.action: Sends the formatted weekly update email to the designated recipients on a scheduled basis.
Agent Tracker Agent.impact: Keeps the entire team aligned on agent progress without requiring anyone to open or interpret the tracker themselves.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Mark submits a vehicle specification form including make, model, year, and any relevant trim or application details, triggering the workflow.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Gives Mark a simple, repeatable submission process that kicks off the entire catalog build automatically with no backend steps required from him.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Queries DFC's internal catalog and inventory database using the submitted vehicle specs to retrieve all matching parts currently stocked and identify gaps.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Pulls exact stock-level data per vehicle application in seconds, replacing what would otherwise be a manual catalog cross-reference.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Formats the raw inventory query results into a structured, clearly labeled Excel-ready dataset distinguishing what DFC stocks versus what is missing for the specified vehicle.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Produces a clean, presentation-ready output that Mark can immediately use or share, without manual spreadsheet formatting.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails Mark the completed Excel catalog file as an attachment, along with a brief summary of what was found in stock and what gaps exist.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the finished catalog directly to Mark's inbox within minutes of submission, enabling faster customer conversations and quoting.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Pulls live inventory status for every part on the weekly backorder report, including on-hand quantity, on-order status, and in-transit data.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Enriches the backorder list with real-time sourcing data automatically, replacing a process that currently requires a dozen people doing independent manual lookups.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Merges the live Dream inventory data into the backorder report, appending status columns and flagging any parts with no available source or resolution path.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Produces a single enriched report that surfaces true dead-end parts immediately, so leadership can prioritize escalations without sifting through raw data.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communications for flagged backorder items, pre-populated with part status, estimated timelines, and appropriate messaging for each scenario.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Enables the team to send accurate, professional customer updates in a fraction of the time, reducing customer frustration and freeing staff from repetitive outreach drafting.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo's online catalogs to extract make, model, year, and part application data for all two-piece rotor offerings.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Compiles competitor catalog coverage in a fraction of the time it would take to manually browse and record three separate catalogs.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped competitor applications against DFC's existing two-piece rotor parts to identify coverage overlaps and gaps in DFC's lineup.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Instantly reveals where DFC is missing applications that competitors cover, giving Dino a clear picture of expansion opportunities.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers asking about demand for specific two-piece rotor applications identified as gaps or opportunities.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Gathers real demand signals from the market passively, so product decisions are informed by customer data rather than assumption.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Compiles all scraped catalog data, cross-reference results, and incoming customer demand responses into a single formatted reference sheet for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Delivers a clean, decision-ready output in one place so Dino can act on sourcing and product development priorities immediately.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls all active Meta and TikTok ad creative and copy fields, including headlines, primary text, descriptions, and CTAs, across every running campaign.
Meta Investigation.impact: Captures the full live ad copy inventory in one pull, making it possible to run a comprehensive phrase scan that would take hours to do manually.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all collected ad copy for specified target phrases or flagged language patterns and compiles an exact-match list noting the ad ID, field type, and verbatim copy where each match was found.
Meta Investigation.impact: Identifies every instance of flagged language across all active ads instantly, giving the team precise, actionable findings without manual copy review.

Meta Investigation.action: Emails a formatted report listing every flagged ad with the exact field and copy where each phrase match was found, ready for immediate review or action.
Meta Investigation.impact: Puts a complete, precise audit in the right hands within minutes of the agent being triggered, enabling fast compliance response or copy corrections.

summary: The AI automation pipeline is in strong shape heading into this week, with 55 total agents across the board — 27 completed, 11 in progress, and 17 planned. No new agents were added this week, and no agents changed stages, so the focus remains on pushing the 11 in-progress builds toward completion. The growing library of completed agents continues to run in the background, driving daily value across email marketing, paid media, creator outreach, customer support, and more. Steady progress — keep up the great work, team!
